mapper.select: SELECT admin_id, username, password, email, phone, create_time, update_time, role_id, real_name, user_type FROM admin
SELECT admin_id, username, password, email, phone, create_time, update_time, role_id, real_name, user_type FROM admin WHERE admin_id = #{id}

SELECT admin_id, username, password, email, phone, create_time, update_time, role_id, real_name, user_type FROM admin
AND username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{username}, '%')
AND real_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{realName}, '%')
AND role_id = #{roleId}
mapper.update: UPDATE admin SET username = #{username}, password = #{password}, email = #{email}, phone = #{phone}, role_id = #{roleId}, real_name = #{realName}, user_type = #{userType} WHERE admin_id = #{adminId}
mapper.select: SELECT admin_id, username, password, email, phone, create_time, update_time, role_id, real_name, user_type FROM admin WHERE email = #{email}
SELECT admin_id, username, password, real_name, role_id, email, phone, create_time, update_time, user_type FROM admin WHERE username = #{username}
